sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37377" key="e)cikmastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξικμ-αστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n37377.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀναποτικός</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sucking up,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν ὑγρῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
